title: Legacy Efficiency
description: This mod brings back the old block-breaking speed from older Minecraft versions, affecting all block types.
body: ## **❓** Information **LegacyEfficiency** is a Minecraft mod originally developed by *superehostile* and ported to newer versions. This mod reintroduces the old block-breaking speeds from previous versions of the game. ## **💕 Credits** - [superehostile](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/superehostile) for the original [mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/old-efficiency-fabric) ## **📝** License This project is licensed under the [MIT](https://github.com/2lay/LegacyEfficiency/blob/main/LICENSE) license.
